— Headline: Practice Impact and Honest Limits

follow_up_links.reason: First large external validation showing multimodal AI matches MDT consensus across five preoperative ovarian cancer classification tasks — a credible benchmark for clinical translation in gyn-onc.
follow_up_links.title: Integrating ultrasound-CT-MR for preoperative multi-task prediction in ovarian cancer: achieving diagnostic parity with multidisciplinary team consensus

follow_up_links.reason: Demonstrates equivalent accuracy between ECA-MRI and HBA-MRI for post-treatment HCC assessment, informing protocol flexibility in surveillance imaging.
follow_up_links.title: Diagnostic Accuracy of Extracellular versus Hepatobiliary Contrast-enhanced MRI in LI-RADS Nonradiation Treatment Response Algorithm Version 2024

follow_up_links.reason: Multiinstitutional DL model detects pancreatic cancer on both NCCT and CECT with physician-level performance, opening doors for opportunistic screening.
follow_up_links.title: Deep Learning Detection of Direct and Indirect Imaging Findings Associated with Pancreatic Cancer at Contrast-enhanced and Noncontrast CT

follow_up_links.reason: Large cohort data linking PM2.5 and NO2 to coronary plaque burden with sex-specific patterns — relevant for cardiovascular risk counseling.
follow_up_links.title: Sex-Specific Associations between Long-term Air Pollution Exposure and Coronary Atherosclerosis at Cardiac CT

follow_up_links.reason: Net water uptake emerges as a superior imaging biomarker for thrombectomy patient selection, potentially reducing futile interventions.
follow_up_links.title: Ischemic Lesion Net Water Uptake Outperforms ASPECTS and CBF Less Than 30% in Predicting Futile Recanalization after Mechanical Thrombectomy

key_claims.claim: Multimodal AI integrating ultrasound, CT, and MRI achieves diagnostic parity with multidisciplinary team consensus for preoperative ovarian cancer classification across five clinical tasks in external validation.
Extracellular agent MRI and hepatobiliary agent MRI show comparable accuracy for LI-RADS treatment response assessment in HCC after locoregional therapy.
A multiinstitutional deep learning model detects direct and indirect pancreatic cancer findings on both contrast-enhanced and non-contrast CT at or above physician-level performance.
Long-term PM2.5 and NO2 exposure is associated with coronary plaque burden and obstructive CAD at cardiac CT, with sex-specific differences in effect magnitude.
CT-derived net water uptake in ischemic lesions predicts futile recanalization after mechanical thrombectomy more accurately than ASPECTS or CBF-less-than-30-percent thresholds.
